title: Lifecycle Continuity Update
summary: Request-to-visit lifecycle repair: arrival confirmation, visit completion, scheduled-visit continuity, and emergency pricing now flow end-to-end. Release f26e2959 - OTA groups d334c57b (production) / 8cc11b0b (staging).

changes.message: Confirm arrival and complete visits reliably - the full emergency lifecycle now syncs from dispatch through completion and rating.
Scheduled visits gained a live lifecycle card, cancel confirmation, and recovery notice on the map visit detail.
Emergency pricing never blocks intake - a server-owned fallback quote applies when an exact service tier is missing.
Realtime tracking, payment approval, and hospital discovery hardened across web, Android, and iOS.
